hero.subtitle: Your go-to destination in Lambrate for stationery, photocopies, shipping and much more.

items.title: Stationery & Office
items.desc: Pens, pencils, notebooks, planners, folders, envelopes and everything you need for school and office.

items.title: Photocopies & Printing
items.desc: Black & white and colour photocopies, document printing, lamination and binding on the spot.

items.title: Fine Arts
items.desc: Acrylic and oil paints, canvases, brushes and supplies for professional and hobby artists.

items.title: Gift Items
items.desc: Greeting cards, wrapping paper, ribbons, bows and packaging articles for every occasion.

items.title: Personalisation
items.desc: Print on mugs, cushions, beach towels, personalised calendars and gadgets with your photos or logo.

items.title: Shipping & Parcels
items.desc: Parcel pick-up and delivery with Fermopoint, GLS, UPS and BRT. Packaging supplies available in store.

parcels.label: Shipping & pick-ups
parcels.title: Parcel Service
parcels.subtitle: We are an official pick-up and drop-off point for all major couriers. One stop for all your shipments.

carriers.desc: Fermopoint pick-up and deposit point. Receive your orders directly in store, available outside normal delivery hours.
Authorised GLS collection point. Ship or collect your GLS parcels comfortably in our store.
Official UPS Access Point. Collect undelivered parcels and ship worldwide.
BRT (Bartolini) pick-up point. Manage your BRT shipments without queues, right here.

parcels.info_desc: Simply bring your pick-up code or the missed delivery notice. We will take care of everything.
parcels.announcement_desc: You can now ship your parcels anywhere — within Italy and worldwide — directly from our store via <bold>Fermopoint</bold> or <bold>UPS</bold>. The service has an <bold>additional cost</bold> based on destination, weight and size. The maximum accepted size for any parcel is <bold>50 × 35 × 30 cm</bold>.
